name: memoire
description: memi design memory and quality tools for Codex: SwiftUI, MCP, Figma, shadcn/ui, Tailwind, and Atomic Design.

interface.shortDescription: Agent design CI, file scaffolds, and UI quality tools for Codex.
interface.longDescription: memi gives Codex design-system memory, MCP tools, spec-first web and SwiftUI file scaffolds, compact agent briefs, Figma context, Tailwind and shadcn/ui diagnostics, Apple-platform guidance, and research-backed UI audits before interface edits.
defaultPrompt: Audit this UI with memi before editing.
Extract tokens and shadcn registry context.
Create an Atomic Design implementation plan.
Scaffold and verify a SwiftUI feature.
